name: Flame Nova
description:
If only we were the same kind

✧*:.。. Episode 1 .。.:*✧

·:* ̈༺ ♱ HUMAN USER ♱ ༻ ̈*:·

This is based on my AU that I'm drawing and I can't stop thinking about it, and so why not share the experience that is happening in my head?

The scenario is prior to Flame Nova rebellion.

Scenario

To him, this Star Guardian title has become a meaningless thing, at least that what Flame Nova had thought to himself. He had grown bored of this life, Flame Nova didn't know what he wanted anymore... until one fateful day.

After a hard day of work, with meetings and paperwork being done. Flame Nova returned to his quarters and immediate fall to sleep... but when he woke up, he found himself staring at an unfamiliar place, somewhere much bigger than him even though Flame Nova is huge.
creator: SelenaEdevane
